title: Bitcoin vs. Ethereum in 2026: Which Crypto Wins?

title: Which Bitcoin (BTC) ETF Is Best for Investors?
description: Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) ETFs have changed how investors get exposure to crypto without holding the coin directly. Instead of dealing with wallets or exchanges, you can now tap into Bitcoin’s price through a regular brokerage account. The problem is that not all Bitcoin ETFs are built the same.
